swahili.open_questions_no_answer_key: Maswali ya wazi (hakuna ufunguo wa majibu)
swahili.build_replicate_transcribe_translate_m: Jenga • Nakili • Andika • Tafsiri • Badilisha • CRISPR • Uchunguzi wa Kimahakama
swahili.a_pairs_with_t_2_bonds_g_with_c_3_wats: A hujiunga na T (bond 2), G na C (3). Watson + Crick + Franklin (1953) walitatua umbo hili kutoka X-ray crystallography. Umbo hilo linaonyesha jinsi DNA inavyojinakili yenyewe na kusomwa.
swahili.helicase_splits_the_strands_dna_polyme: Helicase inagawanya strand; DNA polymerase inajenga strand ya ziada. Semi-conservative — kila helix mpya ina strand moja ya zamani + moja mpya. Meselson na Stahl walithibitisha hili mwaka 1958.
swahili.rna_polymerase_reads_one_dna_strand_3_: RNA polymerase inasoma strand moja ya DNA 3′→5′ na kujenga RNA 5′→3′. Herufi ni sawa, T tu inakuwa U. mRNA inabeba mapishi hadi ribosome — hatua ya kwanza ya central dogma.
swahili.64_codons_20_amino_acids_the_genetic_c: codon 64 → amino acid 20 (genetic code ina ziada). AUG inaanzisha; UAA/UAG/UGA zinasimamisha. tRNA inasoma codon, inaleta amino acid sahihi, inajenga peptide bond.
swahili.point_mutation_one_letter_swapped_inse: Point mutation — herufi moja imebadilishwa. Insertion/deletion — reading frame inahama, protini nzima ya chini inaharibika. Sickle cell anemia ni A→T moja tu — herufi moja, athari ya maisha yote.
swahili.bacterial_immune_system_repurposed_cas: Mfumo wa kinga wa bakteria umetumiwa upya. Cas9 enzyme + guide RNA = mkasi wa molekuli. Doudna + Charpentier walishinda Nobel 2020. CRISPR therapy ya kwanza (sickle cell) iliidhinishwa na FDA Desemba 2023.
swahili.sequence_determines_structure_determin: Sequence huamua muundo unaoamua kazi. Hemoglobin hubeba O₂, antibody hutambua, enzyme hu-catalyze. AlphaFold (2020) ilitabiri miundo milioni 200 — tatizo la miaka 50 lilitatuliwa ndani ya miezi 18.
swahili.forensics_str_profiling_dna_evidence: Uchunguzi wa kimahakama — STR profiling + ushahidi wa DNA
swahili.codis_uses_20_short_tandem_repeat_str_: CODIS hutumia short tandem repeat (STR) loci 20. Uwezekano wa kufanana ni moja katika quadrillion wakati loci zote zinafanana. Innocence Project — hukumu zaidi ya 245 zisizo sahihi zilifutwa na upimaji wa DNA baada ya kosa.
swahili.practice_transcription_translation_mut: Fanya mazoezi ya transcription, translation, uainishaji wa mutation. AP Bio Big Idea 3.A.1 — DNA (wakati mwingine RNA) ni msingi wa uhamishaji wa taarifa za urithi. NGSS HS-LS3-1.
swahili.retrieval_practice_gamified_speed_buil: Mazoezi ya kurejesha — kwa mfumo wa mchezo. Kasi hujenga automaticity — codon table inavyokuwa ya kiotomatiki, working memory yako inakuwa huru kwa fikra za kiwango cha juu, kama kutabiri athari za mutation.
swahili.dna_rna_protein_with_retroviruses_hiv_: DNA → RNA → protini — ikijumuisha retrovirus (HIV) inayoenda nyuma kwa reverse transcriptase. Crick alibuni neno "dogma" mwaka 1957; baadaye alisema linamaanisha dhana, si ukweli usiopingika.
swahili.pick_a_sequence_the_complementary_stra: Chagua sequence — strand ya ziada inajazwa na base pairing (A-T, G-C). DNA halisi hujengwa hivi kila wakati.
swahili.helicase_unwinds_the_helix_dna_polymer: Helicase inafungua helix; DNA polymerase inasoma kila template strand na kuweka ziada yake. Semi-conservative — kila daughter strand ina moja ya zamani + moja mpya.
swahili.rna_polymerase_reads_the_template_stra: RNA polymerase inasoma template strand. Sheria ile ile ya complementarity, lakini T → U. Matokeo — nakala moja ya mRNA ya single-strand, tayari kutoka kiini.
swahili.ribosome_reads_codons_3_bases_at_a_tim: Ribosome inasoma codon (base 3 kwa wakati). Kila codon → amino acid moja. Genetic code husomwa kama triplet isiyoingiliana, isiyo na koma.
swahili.point_mutations_silent_no_protein_chan: Point mutation — silent (protini haibadiliki), missense (amino acid moja tofauti), nonsense (kusimama mapema). Frameshift (insertion/deletion) mara nyingi ni ya uharibifu.
swahili.guide_rna_points_cas9_to_a_20_base_tar: Guide RNA inaelekeza Cas9 kwenye target ya 20-base. Cas9 inakata strand zote mbili. Njia za urekebishaji za seli hufunga jeni au huongeza template unayotoa.
swahili.primary_sequence_secondary_helix_sheet: Primary (sequence) → secondary (α-helix, β-sheet) → tertiary (kukunja 3D) → quaternary (multi-subunit). Kubadilika kwa amino acid moja kunaweza kuharibu kukunja.
swahili.str_profiling_13_20_short_tandem_repea: STR profiling — short tandem repeat loci 13-20. Uwezekano wa kufanana kwa nasibu katika loci zote ni takriban moja katika bilioni. Hutumika katika CODIS, paternity test, na forensic lab.
swahili.a_new_dna_puzzle_every_session_transla: Kitendawili kipya cha DNA kila session. Tafsiri, tambua mutation, tafuta ORF au tatua kesi ya forensic. Streak counter hufuatilia ushindi wa kila siku.
swahili.speed_translation_duel_decode_codons_f: Mashindano ya kasi ya tafsiri. Decode codon haraka ukishindana na saa. Angalia kama genetic code iko kichwani mwako, si kwenye reference card tu.
swahili.codon_table_base_pairing_rules_key_ter: Codon table, sheria za base pairing, maneno muhimu (ORF, intron, exon, promoter, repressor) — cheat sheet unaweza kurudi kutazama mara kwa mara.
swahili.mrna_is_a_copy_of_the_coding_strand_wi: 💡 mRNA ni nakala ya coding strand ambapo U inachukua nafasi ya T. (RNA polymerase inasoma complementary template strand 3'→5', ikitoa sequence sawa na coding strand.)
swahili.no_pam_sites_ngg_found_try_a_different: ⚠️ Hakuna PAM site (NGG) iliyopatikana. Jaribu DNA sequence nyingine kutoka Build tab.
swahili.double_strand_break_created_choose_rep: ✂️ Double-strand break imeundwa! Chagua repair pathway:
swahili.crispr_clustered_regularly_interspaced: CRISPR (Clustered Regularly Interspaced Short Palindromic Repeats) ni gene-editing technology iliyotokana na ulinzi wa kinga wa bakteria.
swahili.a_20nt_rna_that_directs_cas9_to_the_ta: — RNA ya ~20nt inayoelekeza Cas9 kwenye target
swahili.protospacer_adjacent_motif_ngg_require: — Protospacer Adjacent Motif (NGG). Inahitajika kwa binding.
swahili.gene_therapy_sickle_cell_casgevy_cance: Gene therapy (sickle cell → CASGEVY™), cancer immunotherapy, uhandisi wa mazao, mifano ya magonjwa.
swahili.ala_val_leu_ile_pro_phe_trp_met_gly: Ala, Val, Leu, Ile, Pro, Phe, Trp, Met, Gly
swahili.ser_thr_cys_tyr_asn_gln: Ser, Thr, Cys, Tyr, Asn, Gln
swahili.predict_the_effect_type_from_5_options: Tabiri aina ya athari kutoka chaguo 5.
swahili.10_mutation_vignettes_each_shows_a_sho: Mutation vignette 10. Kila moja inaonyesha DNA sequence fupi kabla/baada ikiangazia mabadiliko. Chagua aina ya athari — silent, missense, nonsense, frameshift, au in-frame indel. Baada ya kuchagua, coaching inaeleza kwa nini athari hii ina uwezekano zaidi kuliko nyingine.
swahili.pick_the_mutation_effect_type: Chagua aina ya athari ya mutation
swahili.polar_hydroxyl_side_chain_often_phosph: Polar, hydroxyl side chain. Mara nyingi phosphorylated.
swahili.forms_disulfide_bonds_s_s_critical_for: Inajenga disulfide bond (S-S). Muhimu kwa protein folding.
swahili.aromatic_hydrophobic_largest_amino_aci: Aromatic, hydrophobic. amino acid kubwa zaidi.
swahili.basic_side_chain_active_site_of_many_e: Basic side chain. active site ya enzyme nyingi (pKa ~7).
swahili.polar_amide_common_n_glycosylation_sit: Polar amide. N-glycosylation site ya kawaida.
swahili.basic_long_side_chain_often_acetylated: Basic, long side chain. Mara nyingi acetylated/methylated.
swahili.basic_guanidinium_group_6_codons_most_: Basic, guanidinium group. codon 6 — degenerate zaidi.
swahili.smallest_no_side_chain_high_flexibilit: Ndogo zaidi. Hakuna side chain — flexibility ya juu.
swahili.helicase_unwinds_the_double_helix_at_o: Helicase inafungua double helix kwenye replication origin. Single-strand binding protein huzuia re-annealing. Topoisomerase hupunguza supercoil tension mbele ya fork.
swahili.primase_lays_down_short_10_nt_rna_prim: Primase inaweka RNA primer fupi (~10 nt) — DNA polymerase inahitaji 3'-OH ili ku-extend, hivyo haiwezi kuanzisha strand mpya yenyewe.
swahili.synthesized_continuously_5_3_in_the_sa: Hu-synthesize kwa kuendelea 5'→3' katika mwelekeo sawa na replication fork inavyosonga. primer moja kwa kila origin.
swahili.synthesized_in_short_100_1000_nt_fragm: Hu-synthesize kama fragment fupi za 100-1000 nt (Okazaki fragment) kwa sababu polymerase inaweza ku-extend 5'→3' tu. Kila fragment inahitaji primer yake.
swahili.rna_primers_are_excised_and_replaced_w: RNA primer hukatwa na kubadilishwa na DNA nucleotide.
swahili.joins_okazaki_fragments_by_forming_the: Inaunganisha Okazaki fragment kwa kujenga phosphodiester bond ya mwisho.
swahili.polymerase_checks_each_base_mismatches: Polymerase inakagua kila base; mismatch huondolewa na kubadilishwa. Inapunguza error rate kutoka ~10⁻⁵ hadi ~10⁻⁷.
swahili.catches_the_few_mismatches_that_escape: Inakamata mismatch chache zinazokwepa proofreading. error rate ya mwisho — ~10⁻¹⁰ kwa kila base pair.
swahili.rna_polymerase_binds_the_promoter_e_g_: RNA polymerase inajiunga na promoter (mfano TATA box ~25 bp upstream ya transcription start). Husaidia ku-melt DNA double helix.
swahili.polymerase_reads_template_strand_3_5_s: Polymerase inasoma template strand 3'→5' na ku-synthesize mRNA 5'→3'. Katika bakteria inaongeza ~nucleotide 30 kwa sekunde; ~10-50 katika eukaryote.
swahili.bacteria_rho_dependent_or_intrinsic_te: Bakteria — rho-dependent au intrinsic termination (hairpin loop). Eukaryote — cleavage na polyadenylation signal.
swahili.7_methylguanosine_cap_added_to_5_end_h: 7-methylguanosine cap huongezwa kwenye 5' end. Husaidia ribosome kutambua mRNA + hulinda dhidi ya degradation.
swahili.introns_removed_exons_joined_by_the_sp: Intron huondolewa, exon huunganishwa na spliceosome. Alternative splicing → protini nyingi kutoka jeni moja.
swahili.100_250_adenine_nucleotides_added_to_3: adenine nucleotide ~100-250 huongezwa kwenye 3' end. Huimarisha mRNA + huashiria export yake.
swahili.mature_mrna_exits_through_nuclear_pore: mRNA iliyokomaa hutoka kupitia nuclear pore hadi cytoplasm.
swahili.small_ribosomal_subunit_binds_mrna_ini: Small ribosomal subunit inajiunga na mRNA. Initiator tRNA (inabeba Met) inajiunga na start codon AUG. Large subunit inajiunga.
swahili.each_cycle_aminoacyl_trna_enters_a_sit: Kila mzunguko — aminoacyl-tRNA inaingia A site → peptide bond inajengwa (imekatalizwa na 23S rRNA, ribozyme) → ribosome inasonga codon moja → tRNA inaenda A→P→E.
swahili.stop_codon_uaa_uag_uga_recognized_by_r: Stop codon (UAA/UAG/UGA) hutambuliwa na release factor. Peptide huachiliwa, ribosome hutengana.
swahili.chaperones_hsp70_groel_help_proteins_f: Chaperone (Hsp70, GroEL) husaidia protini kukunja kwa usahihi. Post-translational modification — phosphorylation, glycosylation, cleavage, disulfide bond.
swahili.codon_changes_but_amino_acid_is_the_sa: Codon inabadilika, lakini amino acid ni ile ile (genetic code redundancy). Hakuna athari.
swahili.codon_changes_different_amino_acid_eff: Codon inabadilika → amino acid tofauti. Athari kutoka hakuna (conservative substitution) hadi kali (sickle cell — Glu→Val).
swahili.codon_changes_stop_codon_truncated_pro: Codon inabadilika → STOP codon. Protini hukatwa, mara nyingi non-functional.
swahili.adds_nucleotide_s_if_not_a_multiple_of: Inaongeza nucleotide. Ikiwa si multiple ya 3, reading frame inahama → codon zote za chini zinabadilika. Mara nyingi kali.
swahili.removes_nucleotide_s_same_frameshift_c: Inaondoa nucleotide. Matokeo ya frameshift sawa na insertion.
swahili.extra_copies_of_a_gene_or_region_can_l: Nakala za ziada za jeni au eneo. Zinaweza kuleta dosage effect (Down syndrome = chromosome 21 ya ziada).
swahili.segment_of_chromosome_flipped_may_disr: Sehemu ya chromosome imegeuzwa. Inaweza kuharibu jeni kwenye breakpoint.
swahili.segment_moves_to_a_different_chromosom: Sehemu inahamia chromosome nyingine. Maarufu — Philadelphia chromosome (CML; BCR-ABL fusion).
swahili.repeating_unit_e_g_cag_expands_across_: Kitengo kinachojirudia (mfano CAG) hupanuka kupitia vizazi. Huntington (CAG katika HTT), fragile X (CGG katika FMR1), myotonic dystrophy.
swahili.pairs_1_22_numbered_roughly_by_size_wi: Jozi 1-22 (zimehesabiwa takriban kwa ukubwa, na tofauti — chr. 21 ni ndogo kuliko chr. 22).
swahili.xx_female_or_xy_male_y_is_much_smaller: XX (mwanamke) au XY (mwanaume). Y ni ndogo zaidi, hubeba jeni chache (~70) ikilinganishwa na X (~800).
swahili.23_pairs_diploid_in_somatic_cells_game: Jozi 23 (diploid katika somatic cell). Gamete ni haploid (chromosome 23, hakuna jozi).
swahili.surprisingly_few_many_genes_produce_mu: Chache kwa kushangaza — jeni nyingi huzalisha protini nyingi kupitia alternative splicing. Sehemu kubwa ya genome ni regulatory au non-coding.
swahili.if_stretched_out_1_8_m_of_dna_per_cell: Ikinyooshwa, ~1.8 m ya DNA kwa kila cell. Hupakiwa katika kiini cha ~10 µm kwa histone + supercoiling.
swahili.maternally_inherited_codes_for_37_gene: Hurithiwa kutoka mama. Code jeni 37 (protini 13, tRNA 22, rRNA 2). Nakala nyingi kwa kila mitochondrion.
swahili.amplifies_a_specific_dna_segment_by_2_: Hupanua sehemu maalum ya DNA kwa 2ⁿ (mizunguko n). Hutumia Taq polymerase inayostahimili joto. Msingi wa molecular biology ya kisasa.
swahili.reads_dna_sequence_using_chain_termina: Husoma DNA sequence kwa kutumia chain-terminating dideoxynucleotide. Read length ~800-1000 bp. Sasa mara nyingi imebadilishwa na next-generation sequencing.
swahili.massively_parallel_sequences_millions_: Massively parallel — hu-sequence mamilioni ya fragment kwa wakati mmoja. Illumina inatawala. Read length ~100-300 bp, bilioni kwa kila run.
swahili.programmable_gene_editing_guide_rna_ta: Programmable gene editing. Guide RNA inaelekeza nuclease Cas9 kwenye DNA maalum. Cut hufanya jeni knockout au HDR-mediated insertion. Nobel 2020.
swahili.edits_a_single_base_without_double_str: Hu-edit base moja bila double-strand break. off-target effect chache kuliko Cas9.
swahili.bacterial_proteins_that_cut_dna_at_spe: Protini za bakteria zinazokata DNA kwenye sequence maalum za 4-8 bp. Ziliwezesha recombinant DNA technology. Nobel 1978.
swahili.joins_dna_fragments_via_phosphodiester: Inaunganisha DNA fragment kupitia phosphodiester bond. T4 DNA ligase ni cloning workhorse.
swahili.separates_dna_fragments_by_size_in_an_: Hutenga DNA fragment kwa ukubwa katika electric field. fragment ndogo husonga haraka katika gel matrix.
swahili.thousands_of_dna_probes_on_a_chip_meas: Maelfu ya DNA probe kwenye chip. Hupima gene expression au ku-detect SNP kwa parallel.
swahili.sequences_mrna_from_individual_cells_r: Hu-sequence mRNA kutoka seli binafsi. Hufichua cell-type heterogeneity ambayo bulk RNA-seq inakosa.
swahili.near_atomic_structures_of_rna_dna_comp: Miundo ya near-atomic ya RNA/DNA complex bila crystallization. Yenye nguvu kwa ribosome, spliceosome, replisome.
swahili.read_lengths_up_to_100kb_vs_illumina_s: Read length hadi 100 kb+ (dhidi ya ~300 bp za Illumina). Bora kwa structural variant, repeat, full-length transcript.
swahili.differential_reproduction_based_on_her: Uzazi tofauti kulingana na variation inayoweza kurithiwa. Jeni zinazoboresha survival/reproduction zinakuwa za kawaida zaidi kupitia vizazi.
swahili.random_source_of_new_genetic_variation: Chanzo cha nasibu cha genetic variation mpya. Mara nyingi neutral au yenye madhara; mara chache yenye faida. substrate ya selection.
swahili.random_changes_in_allele_frequency_esp: Mabadiliko ya nasibu katika allele frequency, hasa katika population ndogo. Founder effect + bottleneck ni mifano ya kupindukia.
swahili.movement_of_alleles_between_population: Mwendo wa allele kati ya population kupitia migration. Hupunguza tofauti kati ya population; huongeza diversity ndani ya population.
swahili.formation_of_new_species_usually_via_r: Uundaji wa species mpya, kwa kawaida kupitia reproductive isolation. Allopatric (utengano wa kijiografia) ni wa kawaida zaidi.
swahili.unrelated_organisms_evolve_similar_tra: Viumbe visivyohusiana hu-evolve sifa zinazofanana kwa kujitegemea (mbawa katika ndege, popo, wadudu; jicho katika vertebrate + cephalopod).
swahili.all_life_shares_a_common_ancestor_luca: Uhai wote unashiriki babu wa pamoja (LUCA). Ushahidi — genetic code, ribosome, ATP, glycolysis, biochemistry ya msingi inayoshirikiwa.
swahili.diagram_showing_evolutionary_relations: Mchoro unaoonyesha mahusiano ya evolution. Hujengwa zaidi kutoka ulinganishaji wa DNA sequence badala ya morphology.
swahili.allele_frequencies_stay_constant_under: allele frequency hubaki thabiti chini ya dhana za no-evolution — population kubwa, random mating, hakuna selection/mutation/migration/drift. p² + 2pq + q² = 1.
swahili.interactive_references_pick_a_topic_be: Marejeleo shirikishi — chagua mada hapa chini ili kuchunguza.
swahili.five_nitrogenous_bases_make_up_dna_rna: nitrogenous base tano huunda DNA + RNA — A, T, G, C (DNA); A, U, G, C (RNA). Purine (A, G) zina ring 2; pyrimidine (T, U, C) zina 1. Pairing kulingana na H-bond pattern maalum.
swahili.64_codons_4_encode_20_amino_acids_3_st: codon 64 (4³) huweka code amino acid 20 + stop signal 3. Code ina ziada (degenerate) — amino acid nyingi zina codon nyingi, mara nyingi tofauti kwenye nafasi ya tatu ("wobble"). Universal katika karibu uhai wote.
swahili.third_codon_position_pairs_less_strict: Nafasi ya tatu ya codon hujiunga kwa ukali mdogo — tRNA moja inaweza kutambua codon nyingi. Hupunguza idadi ya tRNA zinazohitajika (cell ina ~30-40, si 64).
swahili.semi_conservative_each_new_helix_has_o: Semi-conservative — kila helix mpya ina parental moja + newly-synthesized strand moja. Meselson-Stahl walionyesha mwaka 1958. ~50 bp/sekunde katika bakteria; ~50 bp/sekunde kwa fork katika eukaryote (lakini maelfu ya fork parallel).
swahili.rna_polymerase_reads_dna_template_3_5_: RNA polymerase inasoma DNA template (3'→5') na ku-synthesize mRNA (5'→3'). Katika eukaryote, primary transcript hu-process kwa kiasi kikubwa kabla ya export.
swahili.ribosome_reads_mrna_in_3_base_codons_a: Ribosome inasoma mRNA kama 3-base codon na kujenga protini. ~10-20 amino acid/sekunde katika bakteria; ~3-5 katika eukaryote. Ribosome nyingi zinaweza ku-translate mRNA moja (polyribosome).
swahili.mutations_range_from_invisible_silent_: Mutation huanzia zisizoonekana (silent) hadi za kuua. Athari yao inategemea nini kilichobadilika, wapi, na katika cell type ipi.
swahili.a_sampling_of_well_characterized_genet: Sampuli ya matatizo ya urithi yaliyoainishwa vizuri. Rasilimali za genetic counseling na therapy za sasa zinakua — kwa maamuzi ya clinical tazama fasihi ya sasa.
swahili.family_a_three_generations_blue_eyes: Familia A — vizazi vitatu, macho ya buluu
swahili.two_unaffected_parents_gen_i_have_one_: Wazazi wawili wasioathirika (gen. I) wana mtoto mmoja aliyeathirika + mmoja asiyeathirika (gen. II). Mtoto aliyeathirika + mwenzi asiyeathirika wana mmoja aliyeathirika + mmoja asiyeathirika (gen. III). Sifa inaonekana katika takriban 25% ya watoto kutoka cross za wasioathirika.
swahili.trait_skips_generations_unaffected_par: Sifa inaruka vizazi (wazazi wasioathirika → mtoto aliyeathirika).
swahili.parents_must_be_heterozygous_carriers_: Wazazi lazima wawe heterozygous carrier ambao kila mmoja hupitisha recessive allele moja.
swahili.affected_individuals_appear_in_both_se: Watu walioathirika huonekana katika jinsia zote mbili kwa frequency takriban sawa.
swahili.affected_aa_homozygous_carriers_aa_are: Walioathirika = aa homozygous; carrier (Aa) ni phenotypically wasioathirika.
swahili.family_b_color_blindness_across_three_: Familia B — upofu wa rangi kupitia vizazi vitatu
swahili.affected_grandfather_gen_i_has_unaffec: Babu aliyeathirika (gen. I) ana binti asiyeathirika (gen. II) na mjukuu aliyeathirika kupitia binti huyo (gen. III). Hakuna mwana aliyeathirika kutoka baba asiyeathirika. Sifa inaonekana zaidi kwa wanaume.
swahili.trait_shows_strong_male_bias_hemizygou: Sifa inaonyesha male bias kali (hemizygous wanaume huiwakilisha; wanawake wanahitaji nakala 2).
swahili.unaffected_daughter_of_affected_grandf: Binti asiyeathirika wa babu aliyeathirika ni carrier wa lazima.
swahili.trait_skips_generation_through_carrier: Sifa inaruka kizazi kupitia binti carrier, kisha inaonekana tena kwa mjukuu.
swahili.no_father_to_son_transmission_sons_inh: Hakuna father-to-son transmission (wana hurithi Y kutoka baba, si X).
swahili.family_c_huntington_like_late_onset_tr: Familia C — sifa inayoanza kuchelewa kama Huntington
swahili.every_affected_individual_has_at_least: Kila mtu aliyeathirika ana angalau mzazi mmoja aliyeathirika. Sifa inaonekana kila kizazi. ~50% ya watoto kutoka wazazi walioathirika wameathirika. Sawa kwa wanaume + wanawake.
swahili.every_affected_individual_has_at_least_2: Kila mtu aliyeathirika ana angalau mzazi mmoja aliyeathirika.
swahili.roughly_50_of_children_of_an_affected_: ~50% ya watoto wa heterozygote aliyeathirika wameathirika.
swahili.equal_frequency_in_males_females_autos: frequency sawa kwa wanaume + wanawake — autosomal, si sex-linked.
swahili.inheritance_pattern_reasoning_ranking_: Inheritance pattern + reasoning ranking — zote mbili lazima zithibitishwe kabla ya reveal. Reveal inatoa alama kwa ranking yako hatua kwa hatua, si jibu lako la mwisho tu. Uchunguzi halisi unadai ujue kwa nini, si nini tu.
swahili.2_rank_these_explanations_most_least_s: 2. Panga maelezo haya (zaidi → chini ya kuunga mkono):
swahili.notice_the_ranking_grade_is_independen: Angalia — ranking grade ni huru kutoka pattern grade — unaweza kujua nini ni sahihi lakini kupanga kwa nini kwa mpangilio usio sahihi.
swahili.during_gamete_formation_the_two_allele: Wakati wa uundaji wa gamete, allele mbili za kila jeni hutengana, ili kila gamete ibebe allele moja.
swahili.alleles_for_different_genes_assort_ind: allele za jeni tofauti hu-assort kwa kujitegemea kutoka kwa nyingine wakati wa uundaji wa gamete (jeni kwenye chromosome tofauti).
swahili.when_two_different_alleles_are_present: Wakati allele mbili tofauti zipo, moja (dominant) inaonekana wakati nyingine (recessive) inafichwa.
swahili.methyl_group_ch_added_to_cytosines_esp: Methyl group (–CH₃) huongezwa kwenye cytosine, hasa kwenye CpG island. Mara nyingi hunyamazisha gene expression.
swahili.acetylation_methylation_phosphorylatio: Acetylation, methylation, phosphorylation ya histone tail. Hubadilisha chromatin packaging.
swahili.atp_dependent_complexes_slide_or_eject: ATP-dependent complex huteleza au kutoa nucleosome ili kufichua DNA.
swahili.mirna_lncrna_regulate_gene_expression_: miRNA, lncRNA hudhibiti gene expression kwa post-transcriptionally.
swahili.some_genes_expressed_only_from_materna: Jeni zingine huonekana kutoka maternal au paternal allele tu. Methylation mark.
swahili.some_epigenetic_marks_survive_gametoge: epigenetic mark zingine hunusurika gametogenesis na kupita kwa offspring.
swahili.who_can_access_your_genome_gina_2008_u: Nani anaweza kufikia genome yako? GINA (2008, US) inakataza genetic discrimination katika ajira + health insurance, lakini si katika life insurance.
swahili.23andme_ancestrydna_reveal_ancestry_he: 23andMe, AncestryDNA hufichua ancestry + health risk. Wasiwasi — incidental finding, usahihi, kushiriki data na third party.
swahili.in_2018_he_jiankui_edited_embryos_for_: Mwaka 2018 He Jiankui ali-edit embryo kwa HIV resistance → mapacha walizaliwa. Ililaaniwa kwa upana. Nchi nyingi zinakataza germline editing.
swahili.hypothetical_selection_or_editing_of_e: Uteuzi au uhariri wa kidhahania wa embryo kwa sifa zisizo za kitiba (urefu, IQ). Kwa sasa ni mdogo kiteknolojia; wenye mabishano katika maadili.
swahili.engineered_to_spread_through_wild_popu: Imeundwa kuenea kupitia wild population (mfano malaria resistance katika mbu). Ecological irreversibility inaweza kutokea.
swahili.should_we_test_for_untreatable_disease: Je, tunapaswa ku-test magonjwa yasiyotibika (Huntington)? Wengine huchagua kutojua.
swahili.familial_dna_searches_solved_cold_case: Familial DNA search zilitatua cold case (Golden State Killer, 2018) lakini zinaibua maswali kuhusu privacy ya ndugu ambao hawakuridhia.
swahili.us_supreme_court_2013_ruled_that_natur: US Supreme Court (2013) iliamua kuwa DNA ya asili haiwezi ku-patent, lakini synthetic cDNA inaweza.
swahili.reference_genomes_historically_eurocen: Reference genome kihistoria ni Eurocentric. Juhudi za kuboresha reference diversity zinaendelea (mfano human pangenome project).
swahili.genome_size_does_not_correlate_with_or: Ukubwa wa genome haulingani na ugumu wa organism (C-value paradox). Binadamu wana jeni count kama roundworm — sehemu kubwa ya DNA "ya ziada" katika genome kubwa ni non-coding.
swahili.heritable_changes_in_gene_expression_t: Mabadiliko yanayoweza kurithiwa katika gene expression bila mabadiliko ya DNA sequence. Yanaathiriwa na mazingira, lishe, msongo.
swahili.building_blocks_of_proteins_9_are_esse: Vipengele vya ujenzi vya protini. 9 ni "essential" (haziwezi ku-synthesize — lazima zipatikane kutoka chakula) — His, Ile, Leu, Lys, Met, Phe, Thr, Trp, Val.
swahili.essentially_no_beneficial_fixation_exp: Kimsingi hakuna beneficial fixation inayotarajiwa. Population iko katika mutation-selection balance au drift tu.
swahili.drift_dominates_few_expected_fixations: Drift inatawala — fixation chache zinazotarajiwa, ingawa mutation hutokea. Kawaida katika population ndogo.
swahili.a_handful_of_beneficial_mutations_expe: beneficial mutation chache zinatarajiwa ku-fixed. Kawaida kwa population nyingi za asili.
swahili.many_fixations_expected_strong_selecti: fixation nyingi zinatarajiwa — strong selection, population kubwa, au zote mbili. Mfano antibiotic resistance ya bakteria.
swahili.extreme_regime_viruses_cancer_cell_lin: Regime ya kupindukia — virus, cancer cell line, asexual lab population. adaptive sweep nyingi kwa wakati mmoja.
swahili.mutation_inquiry_drift_selection_fixat: 🔬 Uchunguzi wa mutation — Drift, Selection, Fixation
swahili.set_per_base_mutation_rate_population_: Weka per-base mutation rate, population size, generation, na selection coefficient. Tabiri ni beneficial mutation ngapi hu-fixed kweli. Hakuna score, hakuna reveal.
swahili.log_n_vs_log_circles_typical_regimes: log₁₀(N) vs. log₁₀(μ) — duara = regime za kawaida
swahili.your_hypothesis_which_slider_has_the_b: Dhana yako (ni slider ipi ina athari kubwa zaidi kwenye fixation rate? Kwa nini?)
swahili.e_g_selection_has_more_leverage_than_o: mfano selection ina leverage zaidi kuliko μ wakati N ni kubwa vya kutosha...
swahili.when_does_the_regime_move_from_drift_d: Regime inahama kutoka drift-dominated hadi selection-dominated lini? N·s inakuambia nini?
swahili.why_are_antibiotic_resistance_and_vira: Kwa nini antibiotic resistance na viral evolution ni haraka sana — ni slider ipi iko kwenye kikomo chake?
swahili.a_neutral_mutation_s_0_has_fixation_pr: neutral mutation (s = 0) ina fixation probability 1/(2N). Hiyo inamaanisha nini kwa large population?
swahili.could_the_same_population_size_be_drif: Je, population size sawa inaweza kuwa "drift-dominated" kwa weak mutation na "selection-dominated" kwa strong kwa wakati mmoja?
swahili.i_can_explain_why_this_n_g_s_combinati: Naweza kueleza kwa nini mchanganyiko huu wa μ × N × g × s huunda regime hii.
swahili.inquiry_widget_no_score_no_reveal_no_a: Inquiry widget — hakuna score, hakuna reveal, hakuna answer dump. Inatumia Kimura full diploid fixation formula (1962) (1−e^(−2s))/(1−e^(−4Ns)), inayo-interpolate kati ya Haldane ~2s katika strong-selection limit (Ns≫1) na neutral 1/(2N) katika drift limit (Ns≪1 au s=0).
swahili.more_than_humans_20_000_many_novel_gen: Zaidi ya binadamu (~20,000). jeni nyingi novel kwa sensory perception + cognition.
swahili.special_protein_dsup_wraps_dna_protect: Protini maalum (Dsup) huzunguka DNA na kuilinda dhidi ya uharibifu wa X-ray. Utafiti kwa radiotherapy application.
swahili.hypersensitive_contact_inhibition_high: Hypersensitive contact inhibition + high-molecular-weight hyaluronan. Saratani ni nadra sana.
swahili.elephants_have_20_copies_of_tumor_supp: Ndovu wana nakala ~20 za tumor suppressor TP53 (binadamu wana 1). Maelezo yanayowezekana kwa kiwango cha chini cha saratani licha ya cell count kubwa.
swahili.axolotl_can_regrow_limbs_spinal_cord_h: Axolotl inaweza kuotesha tena viungo, spinal cord, moyo, hata sehemu za ubongo. Utafiti kwa regenerative medicine.
swahili.stores_fat_not_water_myth_allows_survi: Huhifadhi mafuta, si maji (imani potofu). Huruhusu kuishi wiki kadhaa bila chakula. Maji hupatikana kutoka kunywa + metabolic byproduct.
swahili.population_crashed_12_000_years_ago_ge: Population ilianguka ~miaka 12,000 iliyopita. Genetic bottleneck → diversity ya chini sana. Kila duma ni genetically karibu mapacha.
swahili.modern_whales_descended_from_land_mamm: Nyangumi wa kisasa walitokana na mamalia wa nchi kavu (~miaka milioni 50 iliyopita). Ndugu wa karibu zaidi anayeishi — kiboko. Vestigial pelvic bone bado zipo.
swahili.wide_variation_adder_s_tongue_fern_720: Tofauti kubwa. Adder's-tongue fern — jozi ~720 (nyingi zaidi zilizorekodiwa). Mchele — jozi 12. Binadamu — jozi 23.
swahili.all_female_asexual_for_80_million_year: Wote wa kike, asexual kwa ~miaka milioni 80. Hupata jeni kutoka species nyingine (HGT) badala ya tofauti kupitia sex.
swahili.lobe_finned_fish_thought_extinct_since: Samaki wa lobe-finned aliyefikiriwa kutoweka tangu enzi ya dinosaur. Sampuli hai zilipatikana mwaka 1938. Ukoo ~miaka milioni 400.
swahili.horseshoe_crab_blood: Damu ya kaa wa kwato la farasi
swahili.blue_copper_based_hemocyanin_detects_b: Buluu (copper-based hemocyanin). Hu-detect bacterial endotoxin — hutumika ku-test vaccine + medical device.
swahili.diverged_from_brown_bears_150_000_500_: Walitengana na brown bear ~miaka 150,000-500,000 iliyopita. Baadhi ya grizzly-polar hybrid ("pizzly" au "grolar") wamethibitishwa porini.
swahili.dog_breed_genetics_wild_dna_facts: 🐕 Jenetiki ya aina za mbwa + ukweli wa DNA ya mwitu
swahili.wild_dna_biology_trivia: DNA ya mwitu + trivia ya biolojia
swahili.hormones_travel_through_the_bloodstrea: Homoni husafiri kupitia mfumo wa damu kutenda kwenye target tissue za mbali. Zinaratibisha metabolism, ukuaji, uzazi, stress response, na homeostasis.
swahili.approximate_elemental_composition_of_t: Muundo wa elementi wa takriban wa mwili wa binadamu kwa mass. Elementi 11 tu ndizo >99%. CHNOPS (C, H, N, O, P, S) huunda karibu organic molecule zote.
swahili.recent_extinctions_mostly_human_caused: Kutoweka kwa hivi karibuni (mara nyingi kunakosababishwa na binadamu) + kutoweka mashuhuri kwa historia ya kale. Dunia imekuwa na mass extinction 5 — wengi wanasema tuko katika ya 6 sasa.
swahili.6co_6h_o_light_c_h_o_6o_powered_by_chl: 6CO₂ + 6H₂O + mwanga → C₆H₁₂O₆ + 6O₂. Inaendeshwa na chlorophyll. Chanzo cha sehemu kubwa ya oksijeni ya angahewa.
swahili.c3_most_plants_c4_corn_sugarcane_effic: C3 (mimea mingi), C4 (mahindi, miwa — bora kwa T ya juu), CAM (cactus, succulent — hufungua stomata usiku ili kuhifadhi maji).
swahili.tiny_pores_on_leaves_let_co_in_o_water: Vinyweleo vidogo kwenye majani. Huruhusu CO₂ ndani + O₂/maji nje. Hufunguka/hufungwa kulingana na mwanga, maji, CO₂.
swahili.carries_water_minerals_up_from_roots_d: Hubeba maji + madini juu kutoka mizizi. Seli zimekufa. Huunda transpiration pull.
swahili.carries_sugars_from_leaves_to_rest_of_: Hubeba sukari kutoka majani hadi sehemu nyingine za mmea. Seli hai. Njia mbili.
swahili.plant_hormone_phototropism_growing_tow: Homoni ya mmea. Phototropism (kukua kuelekea mwanga). concentration upande wa kivuli → seli hurefuka → hupinda kuelekea mwanga.
swahili.gas_hormone_ripens_fruit_why_ripe_bana: Homoni ya gesi. Huiva matunda. Kwa nini ndizi iliyoiva huiva matunda mengine. Stress signaling.
swahili.promotes_stem_elongation_seed_germinat: Hukuza urefu wa shina, kuota kwa mbegu, kuchanua.
swahili.promotes_cell_division_delays_leaf_sen: Hukuza cell division. Huchelewesha kuzeeka kwa jani.
swahili.stress_hormone_closes_stomata_when_wat: Homoni ya stress. Hufunga stomata wakati maji ni machache. Hukuza usingizi wa mbegu.
swahili.angiosperm_unique_one_sperm_fertilizes: Angiosperm ni ya kipekee — sperm moja hurutubisha egg cell (embryo), nyingine hurutubisha polar nuclei (endosperm — chakula cha mbegu).
swahili.flower_shape_color_scent_match_pollina: Umbo la ua, rangi, harufu, hulingana na upendeleo wa pollinator. Baadhi zilizo-specialized sana (orchid + nondo maalum).
swahili.evolved_in_nutrient_poor_soils_venus_f: Zilivyo-evolve katika udongo maskini wa virutubisho. Venus flytrap (snap trap), pitcher plant (pitfall trap), sundew (yenye kunata).
swahili.symbiosis_with_fungi_fungi_extend_root: Symbiosis na fungi. Fungi hupanua ufikiaji wa mizizi; mmea hutoa sukari. ~85% ya plant species.
swahili.rhizobium_bacteria_in_root_nodules_con: Rhizobium bakteria katika root nodule, hubadilisha N₂ → NH₃. Ndio maana kunde + pigimbi ni protini-tajiri + huboresha udongo.
swahili.domestication_selected_larger_seeds_wh: Ufugaji ulichagua mbegu kubwa (mchele), zisizoanguka (ngano), matunda matamu (tufaha). Hivi karibuni — hybrid corn, GMO, marker-assisted selection.
swahili.common_in_plants_rare_in_animals_wheat: Kawaida katika mimea (nadra katika wanyama). Ngano ni hexaploid (set 6), strawberry ni octoploid. Mara nyingi huongeza vigor + yield.
swahili.stiffening_compound_in_cell_walls_of_w: Kiwanja kinachoimarisha katika kuta za seli za mbao. Ndio maana mbao ni ngumu + huoza polepole.
swahili.individuals_of_one_species_in_an_area: Watu binafsi wa species moja katika eneo.
swahili.all_ecosystems_on_earth_the_zone_of_li: Ecosystem zote duniani. Ukanda wa uhai.
swahili.role_of_a_species_in_its_ecosystem_two: Nafasi ya species katika ecosystem yake. species mbili haziwezi kumiliki niche moja (competitive exclusion).
swahili.network_of_who_eats_whom_trophic_level: Mtandao wa nani anakula nani. Trophic level — producer → primary consumer → secondary → na kadhalika.
swahili.make_own_food_plants_algae_some_bacter: Hutengeneza chakula chao. Mimea, algae, bakteria zingine. Msingi wa food chain.
swahili.get_food_by_eating_others_herbivores_c: Hupata chakula kwa kula wengine. Herbivore, carnivore, omnivore.
swahili.break_down_dead_matter_fungi_bacteria_: Huvunja vitu vilivyokufa. Fungi, bakteria, decomposer. Hu-recycle virutubisho.
swahili.close_interaction_between_species_mutu: Mwingiliano wa karibu kati ya species. Mutualism (+/+), commensalism (+/0), parasitism (+/−).
swahili.disproportionate_effect_on_ecosystem_d: Athari isiyolingana kwenye ecosystem licha ya idadi ndogo. Fisi wa baharini hudhibiti sea urchin, ambao hudhibiti kelp.
swahili.maximum_population_size_environment_ca: Population size ya juu zaidi ambayo mazingira yanaweza kubeba. Resource, predation, disease huweka mipaka ya K.
swahili.population_grows_at_constant_rate_dn_d: Population inakua kwa kasi thabiti. dN/dt = rN. Haiwezi kuendelea milele.
swahili.growth_slows_as_n_approaches_k_dn_dt_r: Ukuaji hupungua N inavyokaribia K. dN/dt = rN(K-N)/K. curve ya umbo la S.
swahili.many_offspring_little_parental_care_sh: Watoto wengi, uangalizi mdogo wa wazazi, umri mfupi. Wadudu, magugu. Boom-and-bust.
swahili.few_offspring_lots_of_care_long_lived_: Watoto wachache, uangalizi mwingi, umri mrefu. Nyangumi, binadamu, mwaloni.
swahili.predictable_changes_in_community_over_: Mabadiliko yanayotabirika katika jamii kwa muda. Primary (mwamba tupu) vs. secondary (baada ya usumbufu).
swahili.variety_of_life_species_richness_count: Anuwai ya uhai. Species richness (idadi) + evenness (usambazaji). Biodiversity ya juu → ecosystem resilience.
swahili.background_rate_1_species_per_million_: Background rate ~species 1 kwa milioni ya miaka. Kiwango cha sasa ni 100-1000× ya background kutokana na binadamu.
swahili.major_life_zone_defined_by_climate_veg: Ukanda mkuu wa uhai unaofafanuliwa na hali ya hewa + mimea. Tropical rainforest, jangwa, tundra, savanna, na kadhalika.
swahili.n_nh_fixation_no_no_nitrification_orga: N₂ → NH₃ (fixation) → NO₂⁻ → NO₃⁻ (nitrification) → organic N → nyuma N₂ (denitrification).
swahili.co_photosynthesis_organic_c_respiratio: CO₂ ↔ photosynthesis ↔ organic C ↔ respiration. Fossil fuel hurudisha C iliyozikwa kwa muda mrefu angahewani.
swahili.evaporation_condensation_precipitation: Uvukizi → ufinyu → mvua → mtiririko/maji chini ya ardhi → nyuma baharini.
swahili.movement_of_elements_c_n_p_s_through_b: Mwendo wa elementi (C, N, P, S) kupitia biotic + abiotic compartment.
swahili.each_chosen_for_properties_that_make_b: Kila moja imechaguliwa kwa sifa zinazofanya biolojia kudhibitika — ukubwa, fast life cycle, rahisi kukuza, genetic tool.
swahili.heat_separates_double_stranded_dna_int: Joto hutenga double-stranded DNA kuwa single strand. Hydrogen bond huvunjika.
swahili.primers_short_dna_sequences_bind_to_co: Primer (short DNA sequence) hujiunga na eneo la ziada la kila template strand.
swahili.dna_polymerase_taq_from_thermus_aquati: DNA polymerase (Taq — kutoka Thermus aquaticus) hu-extend primer na ku-synthesize DNA mpya.
swahili.each_cycle_doubles_target_dna_30_cycle: Kila mzunguko hu-double target DNA. mizunguko 30 → ~10⁹-fold amplification.
swahili.kary_mullis_invented_pcr_1983_won_nobe: Kary Mullis alivumbua PCR (1983); alishinda Nobel mwaka 1993.
swahili.from_thermophilic_bacterium_in_hot_spr: Kutoka thermophilic bakteria katika chemchemi za maji moto. Hunusurika denaturation step ya 95 °C.
swahili.fluorescent_dyes_report_on_amplificati: Fluorescent dye huripoti amplification kwa real-time. Hutumika kwa COVID test, gene expression.
swahili.reverse_transcription_pcr_converts_rna: Reverse transcription PCR. Hubadilisha RNA kuwa cDNA kwanza. Hutumika kwa RNA virus (COVID, HIV, homa ya mafua).
swahili.partitions_sample_into_thousands_of_dr: Hugawanya sample kuwa maelfu ya droplet. Huhesabu kuwepo/kutokuwepo — quantification sahihi sana.
swahili.diagnostics_forensics_gene_cloning_anc: Diagnostics, forensics, gene cloning, ancient DNA (kama Jurassic Park; kwa kweli mara nyingi <miaka milioni 1).
swahili.first_crispr_therapy_fda_approved_dec_: CRISPR therapy ya kwanza FDA-approved (Desemba 2023). Hu-edit patient stem cell ex vivo.
swahili.crispr_engineers_t_cells_to_attack_can: CRISPR huhandisi T cell kushambulia cancer. Phase I/II trial nyingi.
swahili.crispr_knockout_libraries_reveal_which: CRISPR knockout library hufichua ni jeni ipi essential kwa ugonjwa.
swahili.faster_than_traditional_knockout_mice_: Haraka kuliko knockout mouse za jadi. Hutumika kwa upana katika utafiti.
swahili.disease_resistant_rice_mushrooms_that_: Mchele unaostahimili magonjwa, uyoga usiogeuka kahawia, ngano ya gluten-free (nyingi bado katika utafiti).
swahili.spread_sterility_or_malaria_resistance: Hueneza utasa au malaria resistance kupitia wild population. Field trial bado ina mabishano.
swahili.he_jiankui_2018_edited_human_embryos_m: He Jiankui (2018) ali-edit human embryo → hasira ya moral + scientific. Sasa imepigwa marufuku katika nchi nyingi.
swahili.human_body_has_10_human_cells_10_10_mi: Mwili wa binadamu una ~10¹³ human cell + ~10¹³-10¹⁴ microbial cell. Karibu sawa kwa idadi.
swahili.500_1_000_bacterial_species_in_healthy: bacterial species 500-1,000+ katika utumbo wa mtu mzima mwenye afya. Pamoja archaea, fungi, virus.
swahili.microbiome_carries_100_more_genes_than: Microbiome hubeba jeni ~100× zaidi ya human genome. Huongeza uwezo mwingi wa metabolic.
swahili.gut_microbes_communicate_with_brain_vi: Gut microbe huwasiliana na ubongo kupitia vagus nerve, immune signal, metabolite. Huhusishwa na mood, tabia — lakini madai mengi maalum yamezidishwa.
swahili.broad_spectrum_antibiotics_wipe_out_co: Broad-spectrum antibiotic huondoa commensal → kupona kunaweza kuchukua miezi/miaka. Baadhi ya shift hudumu.
swahili.fecal_microbiota_transplant_fmt_cures_: Fecal microbiota transplant (FMT) hutibu recurrent C. difficile infection katika ~90% ya kesi. Matumizi mengine bado experimental.
swahili.varies_by_body_site_forehead_oily_domi: Hutofautiana kwa body site — paji (mafuta, Cutibacterium acnes hutawala), utumbo (anaerobe), kwapa (jasho la apocrine + bakteria → harufu ya mwili).
swahili.healthy_lactobacillus_dominant_low_ph_: Afya — Lactobacillus hutawala, pH ya chini. Kutolingana → bacterial vaginosis (BV).
swahili.700_species_affects_cavities_gum_disea: ~species 700. Huathiri kuoza kwa meno, ugonjwa wa fizi. Huhusishwa na cardiovascular risk.
swahili.vaginal_birth_seeds_infant_with_matern: Kuzaliwa kwa uke huku-seed mtoto kwa maternal vaginal microbe; C-section kwa skin microbe. Athari za muda mrefu zinasomwa (baadhi zenye mabishano).
swahili.contains_live_bacteria_prebiotics_hmos: Ina live bacteria + prebiotic (HMO) zinazolisha gut microbe maalum (B. infantis).
swahili.sperm_egg_fuse_diploid_zygote_forms: Sperm + egg huungana. Diploid zygote inaundwa.
swahili.rapid_cell_divisions_without_growth_2_: Cell division za haraka bila ukuaji. Stage 2 → 4 → 8 → 16 cell.
swahili.hollow_ball_with_inner_cell_mass_futur: Mpira wa ndani mtupu wenye inner cell mass (embryo ya baadaye) + trophoblast (placenta ya baadaye).
swahili.blastocyst_attaches_to_uterine_wall: Blastocyst hujiunga na ukuta wa uterine.
swahili.cell_movements_form_3_germ_layers_ecto: Mienendo ya seli huunda germ layer 3 — ectoderm, mesoderm, endoderm.
swahili.neural_tube_forms_from_ectoderm_future: Neural tube huundwa kutoka ectoderm. Ubongo wa baadaye + spinal cord.
swahili.all_major_organs_begin_forming_heart_s: Viungo vyote vikuu huanza kuunda. Moyo huanza kupiga ~wiki 4-5.
swahili.growth_maturation_major_structures_alr: Ukuaji + ukomavu. Miundo mikuu tayari imeundwa.
swahili.cancer_cells_produce_their_own_growth_: Cancer cell huzalisha growth signal zao ili ku-activate receptor kwa constitutively.
swahili.tumor_suppressors_p53_rb_inactivated_c: Tumor suppressor (p53, Rb) hazifanyi kazi → cell hugawanyika licha ya stop signal.
swahili.apoptosis_pathways_disabled_damaged_ce: Apoptosis pathway zimezimwa. cell zilizoharibika huishi wakati zinapaswa kufa.
swahili.reactivate_telomerase_telomeres_mainta: Reactivate telomerase → telomere hudumishwa → mgawanyiko usio na kikomo.
swahili.tumors_recruit_blood_vessels_to_feed_g: Tumor huajiri mishipa ya damu kulisha mass inayokua.
swahili.cells_lose_adhesion_migrate_colonize_d: cell hupoteza adhesion, huhamia, hu-colonize tissue za mbali.
swahili.warburg_effect_tumors_use_glycolysis_e: Warburg effect — tumor hutumia glycolysis hata na oksijeni.
swahili.tumors_hide_from_or_suppress_immune_su: Tumor hujificha kutoka au hukandamiza immune surveillance (PD-L1 expression).
swahili.chronic_inflammation_creates_a_permiss: Uvimbe wa muda mrefu huunda mazingira wezeshi.
swahili.accumulating_mutations_chromosomal_rea: mutation zinazokusanyika + chromosomal rearrangement huendesha evolution.
swahili.fast_non_specific_skin_mucus_complemen: Haraka, non-specific. Ngozi, mucus, complement, neutrophil, NK cell, macrophage.
swahili.slower_days_highly_specific_has_memory: Polepole (kwa siku), specific sana, ina memory. B cell (antibody) + T cell.
swahili.produce_antibodies_each_b_cell_makes_o: Huzalisha antibody. Kila B cell huunda specificity moja. B cell zilizoamilishwa huwa plasma cell.
swahili.coordinate_immune_response_hiv_target_: Huratibisha immune response. target ya HIV. Huongozwa kutoka naive hadi specialized subset (Th1, Th2, Th17, Treg).
swahili.kill_infected_or_cancerous_cells_via_p: Huua cell zilizoambukizwa au za saratani kupitia perforin + granzyme.
swahili.y_shaped_proteins_5_classes_igg_most_a: Protini za umbo la Y. class 5 — IgG (nyingi zaidi), IgA (mucosa), IgM (mwanzo), IgE (mzio + parasite), IgD (B-cell surface).
swahili.cell_surface_molecules_that_present_an: cell surface molecule zinazowasilisha antigen kwa T cell. MHC I (cell zote, viral peptide). MHC II (immune cell, extracellular peptide).
swahili.plasma_proteins_that_punch_holes_in_pa: plasma protein zinazotoboa mashimo katika pathogen + kuajiri phagocyte.
swahili.signaling_molecules_of_immune_system_i: signaling molecule za immune system. Interferon (antiviral), interleukin (uratibu), TNF (uvimbe).
swahili.long_lived_b_t_cells_from_prior_exposu: B + T cell za muda mrefu kutoka mfiduo uliopita. Msingi wa vaccine + kinga ya maisha yote.
swahili.train_adaptive_immunity_without_diseas: Hufundisha adaptive immunity bila ugonjwa. mRNA (COVID), protein subunit, live attenuated, inactivated.
swahili.immune_system_attacks_self_type_1_diab: Immune system hushambulia self. Type 1 diabetes, RA, MS, lupus, Hashimoto.
swahili.ige_mediated_hypersensitivity_mast_cel: IgE-mediated hypersensitivity. Mast cell huachilia histamine.
swahili.dendrites_receive_soma_cell_body_axon_: Dendrite (hupokea), soma (cell body), axon (hutuma), terminal (huachilia neurotransmitter).
swahili.all_or_none_electrical_signal_sodium_i: All-or-none electrical signal. Sodium ndani → depolarize → potassium nje → repolarize. ~1 ms. Speed — ~1 m/s (unmyelinated) hadi ~100 m/s (myelinated).
swahili.fatty_insulation_made_by_glia_oligoden: Insulation ya mafuta iliyotengenezwa na glia (oligodendrocyte katika CNS, Schwann cell katika PNS). Huharakisha conduction. Huharibiwa katika MS.
swahili.junction_between_neurons_electrical_or: junction kati ya neuron. Electrical au chemical (mara nyingi). Gap ~0.02 µm.
swahili.chemical_messengers_across_synapse_exc: chemical messenger kupitia synapse. Excitatory (glutamate), inhibitory (GABA), modulatory (serotonin, dopamine).
swahili.reward_motivation_motor_control_low_in: Reward, motivation, motor control. Chini katika Parkinson; dysregulated katika schizophrenia.
swahili.mood_sleep_appetite_ssris_target_reupt: Mood, usingizi, hamu ya kula. SSRI hu-target reuptake.
swahili.neuromuscular_junction_memory_attentio: Neuromuscular junction. Memory + attention. Chini katika Alzheimer.
swahili.astrocytes_support_bbb_oligodendrocyte: Astrocyte (support, BBB), oligodendrocyte (myelin katika CNS), microglia (immune), ependymal cell (cerebrospinal fluid).
swahili.cerebrum_cortex_thinking_perception_ce: Cerebrum (cortex — kufikiri, perception), cerebellum (motor coordination), brainstem (autonomic), limbic system (hisia + memory).
swahili.brain_reorganizes_itself_strongest_in_: Ubongo hujipanga upya — wenye nguvu zaidi utotoni, lakini huendelea maisha yote. Msingi wa learning.
swahili.tight_junctions_between_brain_capillar: tight junction kati ya brain capillary cell huweka molecule nyingi nje. Changamoto kubwa kwa drug delivery kwa CNS.
swahili.20_of_body_s_energy_at_rest_despite_be: ~20% ya nishati ya mwili wakati wa kupumzika (licha ya kuwa ~2% ya mass). Nyingi ni kwa Na+/K+ pump zinazodumisha ion gradient.
swahili.first_mass_produced_human_protein_made: Protini ya kwanza ya binadamu iliyozalishwa kwa wingi. Ilitengenezwa katika E. coli (1982). Ilibadilisha insulin ya nguruwe + ng'ombe.
swahili.single_target_therapies_humira_autoimm: Single-target therapy. Humira (autoimmune), Herceptin (HER2+ breast cancer), Keytruda (immunotherapy).
swahili.covid_19_vaccines_pfizer_moderna_self_: COVID-19 vaccine (Pfizer, Moderna). Self-amplifying version + non-COVID application katika maendeleo.
swahili.replace_defective_genes_luxturna_inher: Hubadilisha jeni zenye kasoro. Luxturna (upofu wa kurithi, FDA 2017). Zolgensma (SMA, 2019).
swahili.engineered_immune_cells_yescarta_kymri: immune cell zilizohandisiwa. Yescarta + Kymriah kwa blood cancer. ~$400,000 kwa dose.
swahili.bone_marrow_transplants_standard_for_d: Bone marrow transplant ni standard kwa miaka. newer iPSC + ESC approach katika utafiti.
swahili.print_tissue_with_living_cells_scaffol: Print tissue kwa living cell + scaffold. Ngozi, cartilage, figo. Viungo kamili bado mbali.
swahili.engineer_biological_systems_bacteria_t: Handisi biological system. Bakteria zinazozalisha dawa, yeast inayozalisha opioid, algal biofuel.
swahili.bt_corn_insect_resistance_roundup_read: Bt corn (insect resistance), Roundup Ready (herbicide), Golden Rice (vitamin A).
swahili.str_profiling_mtdna_degraded_samples_y: STR profiling, mtDNA (sample zilizoharibika), Y chromosome (ukoo wa baba). Ulinganishaji wa database.
swahili.snp_arrays_23andme_ancestrydna_reveals: SNP array (23andMe, AncestryDNA). Hufichua biogeographic ancestry + ndugu wa DNA.
swahili.detect_cancer_dna_in_blood_earlier_dia: Detect cancer DNA katika damu. Utambuzi wa mapema, treatment monitoring.
swahili.treat_solid_tumors_til_therapy_iovance: Kutibu solid tumor. TIL therapy (Iovance, melanoma) FDA-approved mwaka 2024.
swahili.engineered_microbes_clean_up_oil_spill: Microbe zilizohandisiwa husafisha kumwagika kwa mafuta, uchafuzi wa plastiki, metali nzito.
swahili.amplifies_specific_dna_sequences_a_bil: Hupanua DNA sequence maalum mara bilioni. workhorse ya molecular biology, diagnostics, forensics.
swahili.originally_a_bacterial_immune_system_n: Awali ni bacterial immune system, sasa programmable gene-editing tool. Doudna + Charpentier walishirikiana Nobel 2020.
swahili.viruses_are_non_living_infectious_agen: Virus ni non-living infectious agent — vinahitaji host cell ili kuongezeka. Vinaainishwa kwa genome type (Baltimore classification), envelope, umbo.
swahili.microbiome_science_is_advancing_fast_m: Microbiome science inasonga haraka. Madai mengi maarufu (probiotic strain maalum yanayo-"tibu" hali maalum) yako mbele ya ushahidi. Shikamana na matokeo yaliyo-reproduce kwa nguvu.
swahili.germ_layers_what_each_forms: Germ layer — kila moja huunda nini
swahili.defined_by_hanahan_weinberg_2000_updat: Zilizofafanuliwa na Hanahan + Weinberg (2000, sasisho 2011). Cancer nyingi hupata alama nyingi. Therapy hu-target alama maalum zaidi na zaidi.
